summary: Plan-mode classification keeps #87247 as the live canonical docs PR. #87535 is the paired issue for the same docs topic, but it should stay open while #87247 remains under maintainer/product review and has an unresolved ClawSweeper docs-anchor finding. Linked dreaming and memory-plugin refs are related context, not duplicates of this docs PR.

actions.reason: #87247 is the best live canonical for the docs clarification cluster, but plan mode and the unresolved bot review finding block any merge recommendation.
#87535 is paired with #87247, but should remain open until maintainers accept or reject the canonical docs PR.
#77831 is in the same dreaming/memory area but has a distinct runtime root cause and should not be closed under the docs canonical.
#82977 is already closed and must not receive a closure action.
#84882 is related dreaming context but a separate memory-core data-loss bug, so it should stay open outside this docs cleanup.
#85473 is related product context but not a duplicate of the docs clarification and should remain a separate follow-up.
